stimulus: Along with substrate concentration and pH, ambient temperature shapes the rate of ______blank as temperature rises within an enzyme’s tolerance range, so does the rate at which the substrate molecules are converted into product molecules at the active site.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The text before the blank is a complete independent clause that promises an elaboration; the text after the blank elaborates on that rate. A colon correctly introduces this elaboration.

Choice A is incorrect because the conjunction "and" cannot join an independent clause to what follows here without creating a malformed coordination. Choice C is incorrect because a comma between two independent clauses is a splice. Choice D is incorrect because it leaves a run-on.
